response.overview: If you need ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 help with your BitPay wallet, you⭐1-(866)-216-0631 can contact customer support through the official support channels. Open the ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 BitPay app and use the in-app support chat for the fastest assistance. You can also visit the Help Center for guides, troubleshooting articles, and answers ⭐1-(866)-216-0631 to common questions. For account-related issues, security concerns⭐1-(866)-216-0631, or transaction inquiries, submit a support request through the official support page and a support representative will assist you. Always use official⭐1-(866)-216-0631 BitPay channels to protect your account and personal information.  To recover your BitPay wallet, you will need your 12-word recovery phrase or your plain text/JSON backup file. BitPay is a self-custody wallet, meaning BitPay does not store your keys or passwords on their servers and cannot recover your account without this information.
